title: anthyllis vulneraria var. affinis
intro: Anthyllis vulneraria var. affinis, also known as kidney vetch, is a plant species in the Fabaceae family and is a variant of the greater kidney vetch. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating kidney and urinary issues due to its diuretic and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of kidney vetch include its ability to soothe urinary tract infections, reduce inflammation, and alleviate symptoms of kidney stones and other renal problems. Traditionally, kidney vetch has been used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties and improve its efficacy.
